ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Variable name in the dataset */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or methodological details */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the data */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., IPCC, Observational Study) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation model */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer or organization that created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., Atmosphere, Ocean) */,
  "parameterisation" TEXT /* Description of the model's parameterisation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the model's validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the time series belongs to */,
  "time_step" TEXT /* Time step or timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the time step (e.g., year, month, day) */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the data point */,
  "uncertainty_type" TEXT /* Type of uncertainty (e.g., standard deviation, confidence interval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institution, organization) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial coverage entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the coverage belongs to */,
  "latitude_min" REAL /* Minimum latitude of the coverage area */,
  "latitude_max" REAL /* Maximum latitude of the coverage area */,
  "longitude_min" REAL /* Minimum longitude of the coverage area */,
  "longitude_max" REAL /* Maximum longitude of the coverage area */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the coverage */,
  "projection" TEXT /* Projection system used for the coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_coverage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the quality entry belongs to */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset (0-100) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last validation */,
  "validator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the validator */,
  "validation_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "related_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related dataset */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_relationships_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_relationships_related_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the publication belongs to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_publications_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
